commands.review_summary:
The PR adds safe runtime tool-schema projection and quarantine paths before provider normalization, plus focused tests for unreadable tool descriptors, tool rows, allowlists, and bundled MCP tools.

PR surface: Source +288, Tests +351. Total +639 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main normalizes active tools before the quarantine filter, and the PR adds focused tests that exercise unreadable parameters, unreadable rows, and bundled allowlists. I did not run tests because this review is read-only, but the reproduction path is clear from the code and PR proof.

target.title: fix(agents): quarantine invalid runtime tool schemas
target.body:
## Summary

- Keeps this PR scoped to assistant attempt runtime tool-schema quarantine; doctor diagnostics and compaction hardening stay as separate follow-up surfaces instead of being bundled here.
- Safely reads runtime tool arrays, tool rows, tool names, and tool parameter schemas before provider normalization or model-session setup.
- Quarantines unsupported or unreadable active tool schemas, emits diagnostics for unreadable rows dropped during allowlist/bundled name filtering, and preserves healthy tools so the assistant turn can continue.

## Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.test-support.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.test-support.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts --reporter=verbose` passed 2 Vitest shards / 68 tests on head `de4cd1334fe`.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` reported no accepted/actionable findings for this patch. It surfaced compaction hardening as a separate sibling-path follow-up, not part of this PR.
- Touched-file scrub for reported fixture names, private paths, and install-error output returned no matches.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: a bad active runtime tool schema, unreadable tool descriptor, unreadable tool row, or unreadable bundled-tool row should not crash assistant setup before content.

Real environment tested: fresh sparse `gwt` worktree on current `origin/main` using the repo Vitest router; GitHub Actions CI is rerunning for the pushed PR branch.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts --reporter=verbose`.

Evidence after fix: focused tests cover unsupported schemas, provider-repairable schemas, unreadable descriptors, unreadable tool rows, explicit allowlists, bundled MCP allowlists, and quarantine logging without re-reading hostile rows.

Observed result after fix: healthy tools remain available while malformed or unreadable active tools are filtered before provider normalization/model-session setup, and dropped unreadable rows still enter the quarantine diagnostic path.

What was not tested: no separate local Testbox/Crabbox run beyond GitHub PR checks. Doctor validation is handled by follow-up PR #88493. Compaction runtime hardening remains a separate follow-up candidate rather than being folded into this assistant-attempt PR.
target.author: vincentkoc
